title: Four ways Google Research scientists have been using Empirical Research Assistance

title: Enabling privacy-preserving AI training on everyday devices

title: How AI Policy in South Africa Is Ruining Itself
summary: South Africa has had its first draft national artificial intelligence policy removed following the discovery of fictitious citations in the document that appeared to be AI generated. The recall, which has emerged after the draft policy’s phony references were exposed, is more than a bureaucratic blip; it’s precisely the sort of gaffe that might cause a person to drop their mug halfway to their lips. You have to ask yourself: Wait, the policy that is meant to regulate AI just got undermined by AI? That’s embarrassing, to be sure, but also instructive in that it’s a cautionary tale. South African […]
author: Mark Borg
